module.name: swot
module.description: SWOT grid — Strengths / Weaknesses / Opportunities / Threats, colour-coded. Body = 4 sections in that order.
module.aiSpec:
A SWOT ANALYSIS grid (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats). Block module: the body is FOUR sections split by `<!-- @ -->`, in the order S, W, O, T. Each cell is Markdown (a short bullet list works well). Cells are colour-coded (S/O positive, W/T caution) with a heading. Use custom headings via `labels` (comma-separated) for other languages.
<!-- @swot --> - Strong brand - Loyal users <!-- @ --> - Small team <!-- @ --> - New markets <!-- @ --> - Competition <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: SWOT grid
snippet.text: <!-- @swot --> - Strong brand - Loyal customers <!-- @ --> - Limited budget <!-- @ --> - Emerging markets <!-- @ --> - New competitors <!-- @end -->
